dem.source: Copernicus DEM GLO-30 public COG tiles on AWS Open Data
dem.note: Heights are kept in real-world centimeters and clipped only at encode time.

naturalization.purpose: Preserve broad Yarlung canyon shapes while reshaping near-vertical 30m DEM cliffs into ride-scale natural slopes for first-person photorealism.
naturalization.broad_blur: box blur radius=18, passes=3, steep-relief weighted blend

outbound_cliff_softening.source: previous generated Outbound track guide; track CSV is regenerated after terrain generation
outbound_cliff_softening.purpose: Replace the grazing-angle DEM-derived cliff wall with a corridor-mesh-friendly natural slope instead of a fascia mesh.

river_mask.centerline: DEM thalweg extracted from the naturalized height grid
river_mask.purpose: Keep macro river/water masks aligned with the valley floor and generated coaster route.

unreal_import.z_scale_note: Encoded 16-bit heights map to the real-scale 2600m-7300m elevation window.
unreal_import.nanite_followup: Import high-poly rock and vegetation StaticMesh assets with bBuildNanite enabled; these generated masks define placement/material zones.

river.source: DEM thalweg extracted from naturalized height grid

track.note: Generated scenic route with curvature-derived roll_deg for clearance, comfort, and first-person spatial validation.
